postReview.title: United States 4-2 Jamaica (5-2 agg): Hosts secure place in Nations League semi-finals
postReview.description: The USA will be playing in the Concacaf Nations League Finals once again after an emphatic 5-2 aggregate victory over Jamaica.

QAData.question: Who won between USA and Jamaica on Tue, 19 Nov 2024 01:00:00 GMT?
QAData.answer: USA won 4–2 over Jamaica on Tue, 19 Nov 2024 01:00:00 GMT.
